purpose: Goals straddling the deterministic portfolio's reach, for measuring the bus-fulfilled closure lift. Run baseline (deterministic+search) first; emit prove_sketch requests for the failures; fulfilled closures are kernel-replayed. Every closure banks its proof (compounding).

goals.lean: ∀ n : Nat, n + 0 = n
∀ a b : Nat, a + b = b + a
∀ n : Nat, n ≤ n + 1
∀ a b : Nat, a ∣ b → a ∣ b * b
∀ a b c : Nat, a ≤ b → b ≤ c → a ≤ c
∀ a b : Nat, Nat.gcd a b ∣ a + b
∀ a b : ℝ, 0 ≤ a → 0 ≤ b → Real.sqrt (a * b) ≤ (a + b) / 2
∀ f : Nat → Nat, (∀ a b, f (a + b) = f a + f b) → f 2 = 2 * f 1
∀ n : Nat, (Finset.range n).sum (fun i => 2 * i + 1) = n ^ 2
∀ n : Nat, (Finset.range (n + 1)).sum (fun i => i ^ 3) = ((Finset.range (n + 1)).sum (fun i => i)) ^ 2
∀ p : Nat, p.Prime → p > 2 → p % 2 = 1
∀ s : Finset Nat, s.card ≥ 2 → ∃ a ∈ s, ∃ b ∈ s, a ≠ b
∀ f : Nat → Nat, StrictMono f → ∀ n, n ≤ f n
